scripts.proto:generate: mkdir -p typescript/src/generated && protoc -I proto -I /usr/include --plugin=./node_modules/.bin/protoc-gen-ts_proto --ts_proto_out=typescript/src/generated --ts_proto_opt=esModuleInterop=true,forceLong=string,oneof=unions,useOptionals=messages,importSuffix=.js proto/common/v1/field_value.proto proto/article/v1/article.proto
